---
name: Project milestone status
description: Current state of Colmena milestones — M0+M0.5 done, M1 code done pending security hardening, as of 2026-03-29
type: project
---

**M0 — Trust Firewall:** Done. Hardened. On main.

**M0.5 — Workspace + MCP:** Done. 3 crates (core, cli, mcp). 9 MCP tools total. On main.

**M1 — Wisdom Library:** Code complete on `feature/m1-wisdom-library`. MR !1 open. 77 tests.
- library.rs: Role/Pattern types, YAML loading, validation (path traversal fixed)
- selector.rs: keyword scoring, mission generator, role scaffold (slug injection fixed)
- 4 roles, 6 patterns, 4 prompts in config/library/
- CLI: library list/show/select/create-role
- MCP: library_list/show/select/generate/create_role

**BLOCKING:** RRA security hardening — 16 fixes needed before merge.
- Plan: `~/.claude/plans/polymorphic-greeting-sphinx.md`
- 5 P0 (DREAD >= 8.0): MCP delegate ACL, TTL cap, Agent→ask, audit log, delegation audit
- 11 P1 (DREAD >= 6.0): session_id validation, stdin limit, delegate list/revoke, queue prune, /tmp removal, expanded blocked patterns, etc.

**Why:** Security before features. RRA found DREAD 9.4 auto-escalation via MCP delegate.
**How to apply:** Next session: execute remediation plan fixes 1-16, run tests, merge MR, then M2.
